name: Ecclesiastical Insurance Office plc
summary: Ecclesiastical Insurance Office plc, together with its subsidiaries, provides insurance, investment management, and broking and advisory services for individuals, businesses, organizations, and retail customers in the United Kingdom, Ireland, Canada, and Australia. It operates through General Business, Investment Management, Broking and Advisory, and Life Business segments. The company offers charity, education, nursery, real estate, historic Britain, cyber, faith and community, fine art and collections, arts and culture, heritage business and leisure, church, home, funeral planning, car, clergy legal protection, trustee indemnity, church machinery and equipment, private client, and life insurance products. It also provides financial advice on pensions and retirement planning, saving and investing, life insurance and income protection, and tax planning; and mortgage, risk management and guidance, and financial planning advisory services. The company was founded in 1887 and is headquartered in Gloucester, the United Kingdom. Ecclesiastical Insurance Office plc is a subsidiary of Ecclesiastical Insurance Group plc.
